episode_name: El Mozote village cluster massacre sequence
geographic_scope: multi-village massacre cluster in northern Morazán
theater_description: El Mozote village and nearby places including La Joya, Ranchería, Los Toriles, Jocote Amarillo, Cerro Pando, and Cerro Ortiz within the same short military operation.
geometry_method_note: The episode is bounded to the directly affected village cluster identified in court and truth-commission materials.
military_area_note: The operation involved the Atlacatl Battalion together with other military units; sources place participation between roughly 1,000 and 2,000 personnel.
civilian_area_note: No defensible exposed-civilian denominator for the full village cluster was recovered from the source base.
split_reason: A single massacre-sequence episode is stronger than splitting thinly documented hamlets into multiple partial rows.
quality_note: Atrocity documentation is strong, but the bundle lacks the denominator and combatant-victim components needed for formal DR.
